message:
test(audit): add comprehensive tests for audit redaction service

Add unit tests covering:
- Basic redaction of sensitive strings
- Nested object redaction
- Array handling
- Circular reference detection (new "[CIRCULAR]" behavior)
- containsSensitiveData() with various input types
- Edge cases: null, undefined, empty objects

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
